blockingIssues.description: The rerun still only clicks Calendar in the Playwright flow after returning to `/timer`; runtime state continues to restore persisted TimerView from localStorage, so the requested calendar-by-default return behavior remains unimplemented.
The feature handoff still cites commit `568e34d`, which changes only timer-page coverage and does not contain a scoped implementation for the editor auth-navigation repair.

Commit `94f7496` contains the intended `pollSessionBootstrap` stabilization, but it also bundles an unrelated VAL-CROSS-005 running-timer continuity rewrite, so the feature still fails scope-discipline review.

The settings toast is fixed in the repo, but this feature still points at unrelated commit `7835272` instead of the actual toast assertion repair in commit `266727a`, leaving the fix feature untraceable.

The Stop timer regression is green, but the feature still attributes the repair to refactor commit `45e0674` instead of the real stabilization in `94f7496`, so the scoped implementation evidence remains invalid.

`vp run test -r` now fails in `apps/website/e2e/time-entry-editor.real-runtime.spec.ts` because the 'Edit start time' button is covered by a `div[data-react-grab="true"]`, preventing the click and timing out the test.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Tighten `frontend-test-worker` completion rules so handoff `commitId` must directly contain the scoped fix or explicitly state that the work was already satisfied by an earlier commit instead of citing an unrelated green rerun.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Three rerun reviews in this round still failed because the handoff commit (`568e34d`, `7835272`, `45e0674`) did not contain the claimed fix even though the repository behavior was already green.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require flaky-fix and regression-fix features to stay narrowly scoped; if a stabilization commit also rewrites unrelated assertions or expands behavior coverage, the worker should split that work into a separate feature or explain the coupling before handoff.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `tracking-ui-read-session-bootstrap-flake-fix` review found the intended bootstrap polling fix bundled with a broader VAL-CROSS-005 running-timer continuity expansion that later became its own follow-up commit.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Make the manual browser verification exception path explicit in `frontend-test-worker`: if agent-browser is skipped, the worker must record the blocker or rationale in the handoff instead of leaving interactive checks empty while claiming the procedure was followed.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `tracking-ui-read-session-bootstrap-flake-fix` rerun still marked the procedure as followed with no browser-tool attempt and no recorded exception.

rejectedObservations.observation: Apply a shared-state update documenting that the settings success-toast fix lives in commit `266727a` and the Stop timer stabilization lives in `94f7496`.
rejectedObservations.reason: rejected because commit-location breadcrumbs are transient review evidence rather than durable worker guidance; the real issue is inaccurate feature handoff traceability, which belongs in skill guidance.

rejectedObservations.observation: Update library/testing-lanes.md right now to mention that the frontend-entry-editor lane auth path depends on apps/website/e2e/fixtures/e2e-auth.ts.
rejectedObservations.reason: rejected because the observation is narrow, reviewer-derived process knowledge rather than broadly reusable factual codebase guidance, and it is not necessary to unblock this scrutiny synthesis.

override.reason: Current validator evidence is green after the latest follow-up fixes: `vp run test -r` and `vp run check -r` both pass in subsequent worker verification. The remaining review failures are historical feature-traceability and scope-discipline complaints (unrelated commit references or bundled fixes), not live product or validator gaps. Frontend worker guidance has been tightened so future handoffs must reference the direct fix commit and keep flaky-fix work scoped.
